channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: FBI investigating hack on its wiretap and surveillance systems: report
item.description: Hackers allegedly broke into the FBI’s networks, according to a report by CNN.

item.title: A Solar Superstorm Blasted Mars—and Its Atmosphere Freaked Out
item.description: A new study investigated how the biggest solar storm in more than two decades impacted the Red Planet.

item.title: US reportedly considering sweeping new chip export controls
item.description: In an alleged drafted proposal, the U.S. government would play a role in every chip export sale regardless of which country it's coming from.

item.title: Netflix Taps Ben Affleck to Help Get More Filmmakers to Use AI
item.description: The video streaming company announced that is buying Ben Affleck's AI tech company InterPositive.

item.title: Amazon.com is experiencing issues and failing to load prices
item.description: Amazon's website appears to be experiencing technical issues that are keeping users from logging in and preventing prices from displaying correctly. DownDetector reported a spike of outage reports around 2PM ET, and the issues seem to have grown from there.While Amazon.com seems to be able to display the company’s homepage, prices and product information aren't loading, and clicking through to product pages in some cases shows an error page, with text that says "Sorry, something went wrong on our end." Users have also reported being unable to log into their accounts. “We're sorry that some cus...

item.title: ByteDance’s AI Ambitions Are Being Hampered by Compute Restraints and Copyright Concerns
item.description: ByteDance’s new Seedance 2.0 AI video model seemed unstoppable—until heavy demand strained the company’s compute capacity and copyright complaints began piling up.

item.title: Mike Flanagan’s ‘Exorcist’ Absorbs Mike Flanagan’s List of Favorite Actors
item.description: Lots of familiar faces from Flanagan's Netflix horror era will join Scarlett Johansson in his new take on the spooky classic.

item.title: Microsoft confirme Project Helix : la prochaine Xbox fera tourner les jeux PC
item.description: L'ère Phil Spencer est terminée, mais Microsoft ne perd pas de temps. Asha Sharma, la nouvelle patronne de Xbox, vient de confirmer le Project Helix.

item.title: Scientists Claim They’ve Finally Made the Elusive ‘Hexagonal’ Diamond
item.description: After decades of chasing after a rare hexagonal diamond, a Chinese team says their iteration of the elusive material is the most important yet.

item.title: Lenovo adopts Lego mindset with a modular ThinkBook AI PC, but will it be yet another underwhelming Motorola Ara-esque venture?
item.description: Lenovo introduces a modular ThinkBook AI PC concept anchored in enterprise durability, lifecycle value, and system-level AI integration.

item.title: Pokopia made me look at Pokémon’s high-tech future in a whole new way
item.description: Pokémon Pokopia features, of all things, a 3D printer. I wasn't sure why this surprised me so much, given all the other high-tech gear in pretty much every Pokémon game. But I was not expecting to find, inside the once-crumbling Pokémon Center I'd just worked hard to restore, a kind of machine I'd never seen […]

item.title: 'The ultimate do-it-all shoe' If you're not wearing Saucony Ride 19 running shoes in 2026, you're missing out
item.description: I ran 50k in the Saucony Ride 19 and they're my new, go-to daily trainer.

item.title: It’s Peak Season for Birdwatchers to Spot Migratory Hummingbirds, and Our Favorite Feeder Is on Sale
item.description: Early March is the best time to see rare migratory species in your own backyard, and a smart feeder can help you ID them.

item.title: Xbox CEO confirms next-gen 'Project Helix' console will play PC games
item.description: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma is gearing up to spill the beans on Microsoft’s next-generation console. In a post on X today, she revealed that the system is codenamed “Project Helix.” Confirming previous rumors, she says it will “lead in performance” and play both console and PC games. Sharma also notes that she’ll be discussing the system at GDC next week with partners and developers. The next-gen console tease follows Sharma’s appointment as Xbox CEO a few weeks ago, after former Xbox head Phil Spencer stepped down. Last year, it was clear that things were rocky for Microsoft’s storied gaming brand, ...

item.title: Amazon is rolling out a redesigned Fire TV app
item.description: With the updated Fire TV app, users can browse and discover content directly from their phone, manage their watchlist on the go, and play titles on their TV from the mobile app.

item.title: BYD rolls out EV batteries with 5-minute ‘flash charging’ — but there’s a catch
item.description: The Chinese automaker's new Blade Battery 2.0 is capable of charging at up to 1.5 megawatts, dramatically slashing the time it takes to fill up.

item.title: Italian prosecutors confirm journalist was hacked with Paragon spyware
item.description: Italian authorities are making progress in their investigation into a wide-ranging spyware scandal in Italy involving Paragon spyware. But the mystery of who hacked two Italian journalists with Paragon spyware continues.

item.title: United Airlines will ban passengers who dont use headphones while flying
item.description: United Airlines quietly updated its passenger contract, allowing the carrier to remove and even ban passengers who disrupt flights with audio.

item.title: Amazon.com is up and down, with login errors and prices not loading
item.description: If you're having issues shopping on Amazon or loading your playlists on Amazon Music, you're not alone. Downdetector is showing a sizable spike in people reporting issues with checkout, search, and logging in. The problem seems to be affecting both the site and the mobile apps. Several Verge staffers have experienced issues themselves. Clicking through […]...

item.title: It’s official: The Pentagon has labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk
item.description: The Department of Defense has officially labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk, making the AI firm the first American company with the label. Meanwhile, the DOD continues to use Anthropic's AI in Iran.

item.title: United Airlines can permanently ban passengers who don’t wear headphones
item.description: United Airlines has updated its "Contract of Carriage" to include a line that requires passengers to wear headphones while listening to audio and video content on flights, CBS News reports. Under the updated contract, United can "refuse transport on a permanent or temporary basis" to passengers who don't follow a list of rules, which now […]

item.title: Asus ProArt PX13 GoPro Edition Review: Not Just for the GoPro-Pilled
item.description: This 2-in-1 laptop bundle comes with a case, a stylus, and way too much love for GoPro.

item.title: How to watch Frost Fatales 2026, kicking off on March 8
item.description: It feels like we could all use a little (or a large) boost of joy and optimism right now, so it's a perfect coincidence that a Games Done Quick event is on the horizon. Frost Fatales 2026 is running from March 8 through March 14. This week-long livestream will be raising money for the National Women's Law Center, a nonprofit working toward gender justice for women and girls. GDQ events have been branching out with more ways to tune in for the speedrunning fun. Frost Fatales 2026 will be a streaming on the GDQ Twitch channel as usual, but the organization is also now broadcasting on YouTube, a...

item.title: Sarah J. Maas announces two new A Court of Thorns and Roses books
item.description: Sarah J. Maas announces two new "ACOTAR" books on the Call Her Daddy podcast.

item.title: Microsoft teases its next Xbox, says ‘Project Helix’ will play PC games too
item.description: The next-generation Xbox console will play both Xbox and PC games, and its codename is "Project Helix," according to Asha Sharma, who took over as Microsoft's gaming CEO last month. "Great start to the morning with Team Xbox, where we talked about our commitment to the return of Xbox including Project Helix, the code name […]

item.title: A Sequel to ‘The Wild Robot’ Is Finally Moving Ahead
item.description: Roz and Brightbill, stars of one of the best animated films in recent memory, are returning with a new director.

item.title: China’s New 5-Year Plan: More AI, Less US
item.description: Maybe it really is the dawning of the Chinese Century.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 Six Nations online for free
item.description: How to watch the Six Nations for free. Live stream the 2026 Six Nations for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Une lune de Mars est promise à la destruction et cela pourrait arriver plus tôt que prévu !
item.description: Phobos et Deimos, les deux lunes de Mars, sont étudiées depuis presque 150 ans et elles n'ont pas livré tous leurs secrets. Les informations récentes sur la nature de certains petits astéroïdes fournies par les sondes spatiales viennent de changer ce que l'on pensait du destin final de Phobos.

item.title: The 10 Best Shows to Stream Right Now (March 2026)
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again, The Dinosaurs, and For All Mankind are just a few of the TV shows we’re springing for this month.

item.title: X revamps Creator Subscriptions with new features, like exclusive threads and shareable cards
item.description: X is rolling out a series of new features for creators, like the ability to offer paid threads and other marketing tools.

item.title: BYD says its next-gen EV battery can delivers 625 miles on a single charge and be topped up in minutes
item.description: BYD reveals details about its second-generation Blade Battery for electric vehicles, which promises more range, ultra-fast charging speeds and improved longevity

item.title: Want the digicam vibe on a budget? These are my 7 top picks for under $100
item.description: We've rounded up 7 of the best cheap point-and-shoots to cure your ‘smartphone face’ fatigue

item.title: BYD just killed your EV argument with a battery that competes with gas engines
item.description: The Chinese carmaker’s new batteries feature a 5-minute charge and 621-mile range, plus a 620,000-mile lifetime and lower prices. BYD just destroyed any remaining argument against electric vehicle adoption. At a March 5 launch event in Shenzhen, China, it announced the Blade Battery 2.0, a new battery that can drive more than 621 miles on a single charge. In the process, the company has exposed just how far behind the rest of the electric vehicle industry has fallen....

item.title: How to watch Wolves vs. Liverpool in the FA Cup online for free
item.description: How to watch FA Cup for free. Live stream Wolves vs. Liverpool in the FA Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Grindr for lesbians? Here are the best dating apps for LGBTQ women.
item.description: Looking for love, friends, or casual fun? We've curated a list of the best dating apps for lesbians, from HER to Hinge.

item.title: OpenAI, in Desperate Need of a Win, Launches GPT-5.4
item.description: The latest model is supposed to be a big step forward for AI agents.

item.title: The Controversies Finally Caught Up to Kristi Noem
item.description: Donald Trump said he would replace the secretary of the Department of Homeland Security. Noem’s tenure was marked by aggressive anti-immigration tactics and ICE’s killing of two US protesters.
